title: mukia leiosperma
intro: Mukia leiosperma, also known as Indian shooting star, is a plant species belonging to the Cucurbitaceae family. It has been traditionally used for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory, antimicrobial, and antiseptic properties. The health benefits of Mukia leiosperma include the ability to treat various ailments such as fever, skin infections, and digestive issues. In traditional medicine, the plant is often prepared into herbal teas, infusions, or decoctions, and is also used in the form of paste or ointment for topical applications.
